description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight, sturdy legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain is visible across the surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The edges and corners are sharply defined, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The table appears robust and functional, suitable for communal or public use in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas. Its proportions suggest it can comfortably accommodate several people for dining, working, or socializing. The construction is solid, with no visible joints or hardware, emphasizing durability and practicality.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a smooth, natural finish and four straight legs, designed for functional use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow width of the tabletop and the thickness of the wood, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, again showing the full tabletop and all four legs, emphasizing symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow profile and two visible legs.
